mapper.select: SELECT * FROM game

SELECT * FROM game WHERE 1=1
AND (LOWER(name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(translated_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(path) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
AND (releasedate IS NULL OR CAST(SUBSTRING(releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) >= CAST(#{startDate} AS INTEGER))
AND (releasedate IS NULL OR CAST(SUBSTRING(releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(#{endDate} AS INTEGER))
AND developer IN
#{developer}
AND genre IN
#{genre}
AND players IN
#{player}
(name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND (`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') AND image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' AND video IS NOT NULL AND video != '' AND marquee IS NOT NULL AND marquee != '' AND thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND thumbnail != '' AND manual IS NOT NULL AND manual != '')
(name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND ((`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') OR image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' OR video IS NOT NULL AND video != '' OR marquee IS NOT NULL AND marquee != '' OR thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND thumbnail != '' OR manual IS NOT NULL AND manual != '') AND NOT (name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND (`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') AND image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' AND video IS NOT NULL AND video != '' AND marquee IS NOT NULL AND marquee != '' AND thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND thumbnail != '' AND manual IS NOT NULL AND manual != ''))
(name IS NULL OR name = '' OR (`desc` IS NULL OR `desc` = '' AND translated_desc IS NULL OR translated_desc = '') OR image IS NULL OR image = '' OR video IS NULL OR video = '' OR marquee IS NULL OR marquee = '' OR thumbnail IS NULL OR thumbnail = '' OR manual IS NULL OR manual = '')
ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM game WHERE platform_id = #{platformId}

SELECT * FROM game WHERE platform_id = #{platformId}
AND (LOWER(name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(translated_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(path) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
AND (releasedate IS NULL OR CAST(SUBSTRING(releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) >= CAST(#{startDate} AS INTEGER))
AND (releasedate IS NULL OR CAST(SUBSTRING(releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(#{endDate} AS INTEGER))
AND developer IN
#{developer}
AND genre IN
#{genre}
AND players IN
#{player}
(name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND (`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') AND image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' AND video IS NOT NULL AND video != '' AND marquee IS NOT NULL AND marquee != '' AND thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND thumbnail != '' AND manual IS NOT NULL AND manual != '')
(name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND ((`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') OR image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' OR video IS NOT NULL AND video != '' OR marquee IS NOT NULL AND marquee != '' OR thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND thumbnail != '' OR manual IS NOT NULL AND manual != '') AND NOT (name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND (`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') AND image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' AND video IS NOT NULL AND video != '' AND marquee IS NOT NULL AND marquee != '' AND thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND thumbnail != '' AND manual IS NOT NULL AND manual != ''))
(name IS NULL OR name = '' OR (`desc` IS NULL OR `desc` = '' AND translated_desc IS NULL OR translated_desc = '') OR image IS NULL OR image = '' OR video IS NULL OR video = '' OR marquee IS NULL OR marquee = '' OR thumbnail IS NULL OR thumbnail = '' OR manual IS NULL OR manual = '')
ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM game WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE game SET platform_path = #{platformPath} WHERE platform_id = #{platformId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND (`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') AND image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' AND video IS NOT NULL AND video != '' AND marquee IS NOT NULL AND marquee != '' AND thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND thumbnail != '' AND manual IS NOT NULL AND manual != ''

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND (`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') AND (image IS NULL OR image = '' OR video IS NULL OR video = '' OR marquee IS NULL OR marquee = '' OR thumbnail IS NULL OR thumbnail = '' OR manual IS NULL OR manual = '')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE NOT ( (name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND (`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') AND image IS NOT NULL AND image != '' AND video IS NOT NULL AND video != '' AND marquee IS NOT NULL AND marquee != '' AND thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND thumbnail != '' AND manual IS NOT NULL AND manual != '') OR (name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' AND (`desc` IS NOT NULL AND `desc` != '' OR translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND translated_desc != '') AND (image IS NULL OR image = '' OR video IS NULL OR video = '' OR marquee IS NULL OR marquee = '' OR thumbnail IS NULL OR thumbnail = '' OR manual IS NULL OR manual != '')) )

SELECT p.id AS platformId, p.system AS platformName, COUNT(g.id) AS totalGames, SUM(CASE WHEN g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND g.image IS NOT NULL AND g.image != '' AND g.video IS NOT NULL AND g.video != '' AND g.marquee IS NOT NULL AND g.marquee != '' AND g.thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND g.thumbnail != '' AND g.manual IS NOT NULL AND g.manual != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fullyScraped, SUM(CASE WHEN g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND (g.image IS NULL OR g.image = '' OR g.video IS NULL OR g.video = '' OR g.marquee IS NULL OR g.marquee = '' OR g.thumbnail IS NULL OR g.thumbnail = '' OR g.manual IS NULL OR g.manual = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partiallyScraped, SUM(CASE WHEN NOT ( (g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND g.image IS NOT NULL AND g.image != '' AND g.video IS NOT NULL AND g.video != '' AND g.marquee IS NOT NULL AND g.marquee != '' AND g.thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND g.thumbnail != '' AND g.manual IS NOT NULL AND g.manual != '') OR (g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND (g.image IS NULL OR g.image = '' OR g.video IS NULL OR g.video = '' OR g.marquee IS NULL OR g.marquee = '' OR g.thumbnail IS NULL OR g.thumbnail = '' OR g.manual IS NULL OR g.manual = '')) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS notScraped, SUM(CASE WHEN g.`exists` = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missingGames FROM platform p LEFT JOIN game g ON p.id = g.platform_id GROUP BY p.id, p.system ORDER BY p.system
mapper.update: UPDATE game SET name = #{name}, `desc` = #{desc}, translated_name = #{translatedName}, translated_desc = #{translatedDesc}, image = #{image}, video = #{video}, marquee = #{marquee}, thumbnail = #{thumbnail}, manual = #{manual}, box_front = #{boxFront}, box_back = #{boxBack}, box_spine = #{boxSpine}, box_full = #{boxFull}, cartridge = #{cartridge}, logo = #{logo}, bezel = #{bezel}, panel = #{panel}, cabinet_left = #{cabinetLeft}, cabinet_right = #{cabinetRight}, tile = #{tile}, banner = #{banner}, steam = #{steam}, poster = #{poster}, background = #{background}, music = #{music}, screenshot = #{screenshot}, titlescreen = #{titlescreen}, box3d = #{box3d}, steamgrid = #{steamgrid}, fanart = #{fanart}, boxtexture = #{boxtexture}, supporttexture = #{supporttexture}, platform_type = #{platformType}, hash = #{hash}, path = #{path}, developer = #{developer}, publisher = #{publisher}, genre = #{genre}, players = #{players}, releasedate = #{releasedate}, rating = #{rating}, lang = #{lang}, game_id = #{gameId}, source = #{source}, crc32 = #{crc32}, genreid = #{genreid}, platform_id = #{platformId}, sort_by = #{sortBy}, scraped = #{scraped, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, edited = #{edited, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, `exists` = #{exists, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, absolute_path = #{absolutePath}, platform_path = #{platformPath} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM game WHERE path = #{path}
SELECT path FROM game

SELECT path FROM game WHERE path IN
#{path}

SELECT path FROM game WHERE platform_id = #{platformId} AND path IN
#{path}
SELECT * FROM game WHERE game_id = #{param1} AND platform_id = #{param2}
SELECT * FROM game WHERE game_id = #{gameId}
SELECT * FROM game WHERE path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%')
SELECT * FROM game WHERE path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param1}, '%') AND platform_id = #{param2}
SELECT * FROM game WHERE name = #{param1} AND path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param2}, '%') AND platform_id = #{param3}
SELECT * FROM game WHERE name = #{param1} AND platform_id = #{param2}
SELECT * FROM game WHERE game_id = #{param1} AND platform_id = #{param2}
SELECT * FROM game WHERE crc32 = #{param1} AND platform_id = #{param2}
SELECT * FROM game WHERE path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param1}) AND platform_id = #{param2}
SELECT * FROM game WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{param1}) AND platform_id = #{param2}

SELECT g.* FROM game g WHERE 1=1
AND g.platform_id IN
#{platformId}
AND g.rating >= #{ratingMin}
AND (g.releasedate IS NULL OR g.releasedate LIKE CONCAT(#{yearMin}, '%') OR CAST(SUBSTRING(g.releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) >= CAST(#{yearMin} AS INTEGER))
AND (g.releasedate IS NULL OR g.releasedate LIKE CONCAT(#{yearMax}, '%') OR CAST(SUBSTRING(g.releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(#{yearMax} AS INTEGER))
AND (g.developer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{developer}, '%'))
AND (g.publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{publisher}, '%'))
AND (g.genre LIKE CONCAT('%', #{genre}, '%'))
AND (g.players IS NULL OR g.players >= #{minPlayers} OR g.players LIKE CONCAT(#{minPlayers}, '-%') OR g.players LIKE CONCAT('%', #{minPlayers}, '+'))
AND (g.lang LIKE CONCAT('%', #{language}, '%'))
AND (
OR
(g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND g.image IS NOT NULL AND g.image != '' AND g.video IS NOT NULL AND g.video != '' AND g.marquee IS NOT NULL AND g.marquee != '' AND g.thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND g.thumbnail != '' AND g.manual IS NOT NULL AND g.manual != '')
(g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND (g.image IS NULL OR g.image = '' OR g.video IS NULL OR g.video = '' OR g.marquee IS NULL OR g.marquee = '' OR g.thumbnail IS NULL OR g.thumbnail = '' OR g.manual IS NULL OR g.manual = ''))
(g.name IS NULL OR g.name = '' OR (g.`desc` IS NULL AND g.translated_desc IS NULL) OR (g.`desc` = '' AND g.translated_desc IS NULL) OR (g.`desc` IS NULL AND g.translated_desc = '') OR (g.`desc` = '' AND g.translated_desc = ''))
)
ORDER BY g.name

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game g WHERE 1=1
AND g.platform_id IN
#{platformId}
AND g.rating >= #{ratingMin}
AND (g.releasedate IS NULL OR g.releasedate LIKE CONCAT(#{yearMin}, '%') OR CAST(SUBSTRING(g.releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) >= CAST(#{yearMin} AS INTEGER))
AND (g.releasedate IS NULL OR g.releasedate LIKE CONCAT(#{yearMax}, '%') OR CAST(SUBSTRING(g.releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(#{yearMax} AS INTEGER))
AND (g.developer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{developer}, '%'))
AND (g.publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{publisher}, '%'))
AND (g.genre LIKE CONCAT('%', #{genre}, '%'))
AND (g.players IS NULL OR g.players >= #{minPlayers} OR g.players LIKE CONCAT(#{minPlayers}, '-%') OR g.players LIKE CONCAT('%', #{minPlayers}, '+'))
AND (g.lang LIKE CONCAT('%', #{language}, '%'))
AND (g.releasedate IS NULL OR CAST(SUBSTRING(g.releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) >= CAST(#{startDate} AS INTEGER))
AND (g.releasedate IS NULL OR CAST(SUBSTRING(g.releasedate, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(#{endDate} AS INTEGER))
AND g.developer IN
#{developer}
AND g.publisher IN
#{publisher}
AND g.genre IN
#{genre}
AND g.players IN
#{player}
AND g.name REGEXP #{gameNameRegex}
AND (
OR
(g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND g.image IS NOT NULL AND g.image != '' AND g.video IS NOT NULL AND g.video != '' AND g.marquee IS NOT NULL AND g.marquee != '' AND g.thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND g.thumbnail != '' AND g.manual IS NOT NULL AND g.manual != '')
(g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND (g.image IS NULL OR g.image = '' OR g.video IS NULL OR g.video = '' OR g.marquee IS NULL OR g.marquee = '' OR g.thumbnail IS NULL OR g.thumbnail = '' OR g.manual IS NULL OR g.manual = ''))
NOT ( (g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND g.image IS NOT NULL AND g.image != '' AND g.video IS NOT NULL AND g.video != '' AND g.marquee IS NOT NULL AND g.marquee != '' AND g.thumbnail IS NOT NULL AND g.thumbnail != '' AND g.manual IS NOT NULL AND g.manual != '') OR (g.name IS NOT NULL AND g.name != '' AND (g.`desc` IS NOT NULL AND g.`desc` != '' OR g.translated_desc IS NOT NULL AND g.translated_desc != '') AND (g.image IS NULL OR g.image = '' OR g.video IS NULL OR g.video = '' OR g.marquee IS NULL OR g.marquee = '' OR g.thumbnail IS NULL OR g.thumbnail = '' OR g.manual IS NULL OR g.manual = '')) )
)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game WHERE platform_id = #{platformId}
SELECT DISTINCT developer FROM game WHERE developer IS NOT NULL AND developer != '' ORDER BY developer
SELECT DISTINCT publisher FROM game WHERE publisher IS NOT NULL AND publisher != '' ORDER BY publisher
SELECT DISTINCT genre FROM game WHERE genre IS NOT NULL AND genre != '' ORDER BY genre
SELECT DISTINCT players FROM game WHERE players IS NOT NULL AND players != '' ORDER BY players
